creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Hi,
 After about 9yrs of maintaining FreeBSD ports
someone at FreeBSD has blacklisted my email
address -- the *same* one I have been using all
those years. If I am not able to correspond on
the appropriate email lists regarding the ports
I maintain. I can not effectively maintain those
ports. As a result I must send them all back to
the pool. I'll miss you all! :(

--Chris
